violations.text: Establishment did not have an employee that has successfully completed an approved food safety manager course during time of inspection. Establishment must have a food safety manager on at all times when time/temperature control for safety foods are being prepared/served. Establishment enroll additional employees in a food safety course. Please email inspector proof of enrollment. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025

The ice machine and prep sink are lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/26/2025

Establishment did not have a person in charge that has successfully completed an approved food safety certification course. Please email inspector proof that additional employees have been enrolled and completed an approved food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2024

Pasta was observed held at 46-49 degrees Fahrenheit in prep unit #4. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, pasta had been in the unit for about 3 hours. Pasta was relocated to the walk-in cooler to cool. Pasta was observed stored over the fill line. Food must not be stored over the fill line. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
